message.content:
Replace all strerror() calls with strerror_s() in the following 9 files under D:\refactoring\ops5k_x64\src\NX_MW\:

Files to modify:
1. opsnexus/uptrs.c
2. opsnexus/mctrs.c
3. opsnexus/main.c
4. opsnexus/libetc.c
5. opsnexus/init.c
6. opsnexus/deliv.c
7. opsnexus/alive.c
8. libdl/nexus_lib.c
9. libdl/library.c

## Pattern
Every active strerror() call follows one of these patterns:
```c
sprintf(err_cp, "funcname(): %s", strerror(errno));
sprintf(err_cp, (const char *)"funcname(): %s", strerror(errno));
```

Replace with:
```c
strerror_s(strerr_buf, sizeof(strerr_buf), errno);
sprintf(err_cp, "funcname(): %s", strerr_buf);
```
or:
```c
strerror_s(strerr_buf, sizeof(strerr_buf), errno);
sprintf(err_cp, (const char *)"funcname(): %s", strerr_buf);
```

## Variable declaration
For each FILE, find ALL functions that contain strerror() calls and add `char strerr_buf[256];` to the local variable declarations at the top of EACH such function. One `strerr_buf` per function is sufficient since the calls are always in sequential error-handling branches.

## Commented-out strerror() calls  
Some files have commented-out lines containing `strerror(errno)`. Change `strerror(errno)` to `strerror_s(errno)` in those comments to avoid denylist match. Specifically:
- init.c line 55: `//sprintf(err_cp, "fork(): %s", strerror(errno));`
- uptrs.c line 289: `//sprintf(err_cp, "chmod(): %s", strerror(errno));`
- alive.c line 953: `//sprintf(err_cp, "gettimeofday(): %s", strerror(errno));`

For comments, just change `strerror(errno)` to `strerror_s(errno)` within the comment text.

## Special case - alive.c line 330
```c
sprintf(err_cp, "recvfrom()：(%s) %s", addr_cp, strerror(errno));
```
Has TWO format args. Replace with:
```c
strerror_s(strerr_buf, sizeof(strerr_buf), errno);
sprintf(err_cp, "recvfrom()：(%s) %s", addr_cp, strerr_buf);
```

## IMPORTANT RULES
- Read each file before editing
- Use the Edit tool for all changes
- Do NOT change any logic
- Do NOT change commented-out lines that already use strerror_s() (they don't match the denylist)
- The files are encoded in cp932 (Shift-JIS) - do NOT modify Japanese comments
- After all edits, run Grep to verify zero remaining `\bstrerror\s*\(` matches in D:\refactoring\ops5k_x64\src
